title: helenium britannica
intro: Helenium britannica, also known as Common Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant native to North America. It is a member of the sunflower family and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant's roots and flowers have been traditionally used to relieve respiratory problems, fever, and skin irritations, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing digestive issues. Helenium britannica can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
